compiled_state.title: Write spike summary report with go/no-go recommendation
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Document all spike findings in plugins/dso/docs/designs/playwright-cli-spike-report.md with a clear go/no-go recommendation.

TDD exemption: Static assets only (criterion 3 — Markdown documentation with no executable logic).

Report must include:
1. Executive summary with go/no-go recommendation
2. Async DOM mutation findings (waitForSelector + waitForLoadState results)
3. Binary sharing status (shared, mismatched, or Python Playwright absent)
4. Session persistence results
5. Output format compatibility for snapshot/screenshot/console
6. Risks and mitigation (alpha stability, version pinning, fallback plan)
7. No-go cleanup instructions: if recommendation is no-go, specify (a) remove spike-env/, (b) delete or mark test file with [SKIP: no-go] in .test-index

Report must be reviewed by the story owner before the spike is closed to confirm go/no-go reasoning is consistent with test output.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/docs/designs/playwright-cli-spike-report.md (CREATE)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Report file exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/docs/designs/playwright-cli-spike-report.md
- [ ] Report contains go/no-go section
  Verify: grep -qi "go.no-go\|recommendation" plugins/dso/docs/designs/playwright-cli-spike-report.md
- [ ] Report references all 4 validation areas
  Verify: grep -c "async\|binary\|session\|output format" plugins/dso/docs/designs/playwright-cli-spike-report.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] Report includes no-go cleanup instructions
  Verify: grep -qi "no-go.*cleanup\|cleanup.*no-go\|spike-env" plugins/dso/docs/designs/playwright-cli-spike-report.md
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (none required — TDD exemption criterion 3: static assets) ✓
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ — AC1-AC4 all pass. AC5 (tests/run-all.sh) has pre-existing failures unrelated to this doc-only task (Hook Tests, Script Tests, Python Skill/Docs suites fail on HEAD before this change; working tree was clean, no prior code modified).
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Fixed: Spike report created with GO recommendation
comments.author: Test
